verses.1: A Psalm of David. LORD, I call upon You; hurry to me! Listen to my voice when I call to You!
verses.2: May my prayer be counted as incense before You; The raising of my hands as the evening offering.
verses.3: Set a guard, LORD, over my mouth; Keep watch over the door of my lips.
verses.4: Do not incline my heart to any evil thing, To practice deeds of wickedness With people who do wrong; And may I not taste their delicacies.
verses.5: May the righteous strike me with mercy and discipline me; It is oil for the head; My head shall not refuse it, For my prayer is still against their evil deeds.
verses.6: Their judges are thrown down by the sides of the rock, And they hear my words, for they are pleasant.
verses.7: As when one plows and breaks open the earth, Our bones have been scattered at the mouth of Sheol.
verses.8: For my eyes are toward You, GOD, the Lord; In You I take refuge; do not leave me defenseless.
verses.9: Keep me from the jaws of the trap which they have set for me, And from the snares of those who do wrong.
verses.10: May the wicked fall into their own nets, While I pass by safely.
